WALLPAPERS.TITLE: Mobile Wallpapers
WALLPAPERS.SUBTITLE: Find and preview high-quality mobile portrait backgrounds on an interactive smartphone simulator.
WALLPAPERS.SEARCH_PLACEHOLDER: Search portrait photos (e.g. beach, neon, forest)...
WALLPAPERS.NO_RESULTS: No wallpapers found. Try a different search query.
WALLPAPERS.KEY_MODAL_DESC: We integrate with Pexels to offer millions of free portrait photos. Get a free API key at pexels.com and paste it below to enable live search.
WALLPAPERS.KEY_INPUT_PLACEHOLDER: Paste your Pexels API Key here...

DOWNLOAD.TITLE: Get the Mobile App
DOWNLOAD.DESC: Experience the best of Tamil literature on the go with our official Android app.
DOWNLOAD.FEATURE_1_DESC: Read your favorite poems anywhere, anytime without internet.
DOWNLOAD.FEATURE_2_DESC: Start your day with an inspiring new poem delivered to your phone.
DOWNLOAD.FEATURE_3_DESC: Save, like, and share the poems that touch your heart.

HERO.DESC: I'm Pravin, a software engineer who loves crafting innovative solutions. I bridge the gap between logic and creativity.

CARDS.NEW_YEAR_DESC: As we step into this brand-new year, I wish you endless joy, boundless opportunities, and all the success your heart desires. May 2026 be a year of growth, creativity, and cherished moments.
CARDS.ABOUT_DESC_1: I'm a dedicated full-stack software engineer who loves crafting innovative and efficient solutions across the tech stack.
CARDS.ABOUT_DESC_2: Beyond coding, I find solace in poetry and blogging—merging technical know-how with a touch of artistry.
